description_long: This is a small, dark amber glass bottle with a black screw cap and a rubber-tipped dropper. The bottle features a gold and white label on the front, displaying the product name 'CBG' and additional branding and supplement information. The label wraps around the bottle, with supplement facts and usage instructions visible on the sides and back. The bottle is cylindrical with a smooth, glossy surface and a slightly rounded shoulder leading up to the cap. The dropper is integrated into the cap, with a visible rubber bulb for dispensing liquid. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and typical of medicinal or supplement dropper bottles.
description: A small, dark amber glass dropper bottle with a black screw cap and gold-accented label, commonly used for supplements or medicinal liquids.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gold and white label with 'CBG' branding and product details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the supplement facts and additional product information on the label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more detailed supplement facts and usage instructions in fine print.
description_view_3: Back-side view with a barcode and circular icons, partially showing the label's branding elements.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle has a gold and white label on the front with the text 'CBG', 'CBG:CBD', and other supplement and branding information. The label wraps around the bottle, with supplement facts, usage instructions, and a barcode visible on the sides and back. The text is primarily gold and white on a dark background, with some circular icons.
